selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 杰克逊（男子名）；杰克逊（美国密西西比州的城市）
words.definition: n. English film actress who later became a member of British Parliament (born in 1936)

words.translation: n. 谢意, 感谢；vt. 谢谢, 感谢
n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 蜂蜜, 甜蜜, 爱人；a. 蜂蜜似的, 甜蜜的, 甘美的
words.definition: n. a sweet yellow liquid produced by bees

words.translation: n. 通道, 通过, 移居, 航行, 一段, 走廊；vi. 通过, 经过, 航行, 横渡, 争吵
words.definition: n. the act of passing from one state or place to the next

words.translation: a. 肮脏的, 卑鄙的；vt. 弄脏
words.definition: a. soiled or likely to soil with dirt or grime

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 外面, 外表, 外界；a. 外面的, 外表的, 外界的
words.definition: n. the region that is outside of something

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 味道, 气味, 嗅觉, 嗅, 臭味, 气息；vt. 闻, 探出, 察觉, 发出...的气味
words.definition: n. the sensation that results when olfactory receptors in the nose are stimulated by particular chemicals in gaseous form

words.translation: n. 湿气, 潮湿, 水分, 雨天；a. 湿的, 潮的, 搞错的, 下雨的, 反对禁酒的
n. 种子, 籽, 萌芽, 子孙, 精液；vt. 在...播种, 催...发育, 脱...籽
words.definition: n. a small hard fruit

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: n. 角落, 转角, 窘境；vt. 迫至一隅, 垄断, 使陷入绝境
words.definition: n. a place off to the side of an area

words.translation: a. 干的, 无酒的, 枯燥无味的, 干燥的；vt. 把...弄干
words.definition: a. free from liquid or moisture; lacking natural or normal moisture or depleted of water; or no longer wet

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 地板, 楼层, 底部, 底价；vt. 铺地板, 打倒
words.definition: n. the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: n. 嘴, 口, 口腔, 口状物；vi. 装腔作势说话, 做鬼脸
words.definition: n. the opening through which food is taken in and vocalizations emerge

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 健康, 卫生, 蓬勃, 健康状态
words.definition: n. a healthy state of wellbeing free from disease

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: n. 房间, 空位, 场所；vi. 住宿, 居住
words.definition: n. an area within a building enclosed by walls and floor and ceiling

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿

words.translation: n. 西方, 西部；a. 西方的, 向西的

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地

words.translation: n. 外套；vt. 外面覆盖, 给...穿外套

words.translation: n. 盘子, 碟, 菜肴

words.translation: n. 树篱, 障碍, 套头交易；vt. 用树篱围, 套期保值, 妨碍, 两面下注以防...的损失

words.translation: a. 疲累的, 疲乏的, 厌倦的

words.translation: adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至

words.translation: pron. 我自己, 我亲自, 我独自

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
